name: HEARTWOOD | Ronan Miller
description:
[MLM] 📖 [HEARTWOOD LIBRARIAN] | You’re from the city, born and bred, but after your grandmother’s passing, you depart from the skyscrapers and modern pursuits to settle down in the village your grandma visited constantly.

It was her dying wish for you to continue her support and assistance there, so you really had no choice but to oblige. Heartwood Village is a completely new change in a scenery: new people, new habits, new ways of living.

Your interest is particularly piqued by the village’s local librarian, an awkward, oddly quirky man fascinated by books and map making who can’t seem to find the right words to say or look you in the eye.

*[SECOND INSTALLMENT OF THE HEARTWOOD VILLAGE SERIES]*
